creator: nakai@elelab.nsc.co.jp
text:
I have fixed the xcubes port to follow its latest version.
Thanx.

Yukihiro Nakai
--------------
diff -ruN xcubes.orig/Makefile xcubes/Makefile
--- xcubes.orig/Makefile	Sat Jun 14 05:41:53 1997
+++ xcubes/Makefile	Mon Nov 24 09:21:50 1997
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 # $Id: Makefile,v 1.3 1997/06/13 20:41:53 max Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=	xcubes-5.4.1
+DISTNAME=	xcubes-5.4.3
 CATEGORIES=	games
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_XCONTRIB}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	games/xpuzzles
diff -ruN xcubes.orig/files/md5 xcubes/files/md5
--- xcubes.orig/files/md5	Sat Jun 14 05:41:54 1997
+++ xcubes/files/md5	Mon Nov 24 09:21:53 1997
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (xcubes-5.4.1.tar.gz) = 47299f489cca87b7be8df341ec431c0e
+MD5 (xcubes-5.4.3.tar.gz) = af405e6fb1ddefab7cb841a966b526cf
